restaurants.name: Casa Rafel
restaurants.quote: Triana y Los Remedios son dos barrios contiguos, una de las zonas de la ciudad donde se concentran más bares y restaurantes de calidad.

restaurants.name: Victoria 8
restaurants.quote: Signature dish rabo de toro; listed among Triana and Los Remedios restaurants of quality by director Pepe Monforte.

restaurants.name: Arrocería Criaito
restaurants.quote: Signature arroz con gambas; lunch-only rice specialist listed by Pepe Monforte among the best restaurants of Triana and Los Remedios.

restaurants.name: Bar Amarra
restaurants.quote: Signature cazón en tomate; featured in CosasDeCome's guide to quality eating in Triana and Los Remedios.

restaurants.name: De la O
restaurants.quote: Located next to the Puente de la Expiración with views of the Guadalquivir; listed by Pepe Monforte among the finest restaurants of Triana and Los Remedios.

restaurants.name: El Mercader de Triana
restaurants.quote: Listed in CosasDeCome's guide to quality eating in Triana and Los Remedios by director Pepe Monforte; price range €20–30.

restaurants.name: La Casa del Cordero – La Mesa de Concha
restaurants.quote: Signature mollejas; daily lunch service; listed among the recommended restaurants of Triana and Los Remedios by Pepe Monforte.

restaurants.name: La Montanera
restaurants.quote: Listed in CosasDeCome's guide to quality eating in Triana and Los Remedios by director Pepe Monforte; open Wednesday to Sunday.

restaurants.name: La Reserva de Joaquín Márquez
restaurants.quote: Listed in CosasDeCome's guide to quality eating in Triana and Los Remedios by director Pepe Monforte.

restaurants.name: Restaurante Jaylu
restaurants.quote: Price range €50+; five reader recommendations; listed among the finest restaurants of Triana and Los Remedios by Pepe Monforte.

restaurants.name: Alfarería 21
restaurants.quote: Six reader recommendations; among the best tapas bars in Triana and Los Remedios according to Pepe Monforte's CosasDeCome guide.

restaurants.name: Bar Casa Casimiro
restaurants.quote: Three reader recommendations; listed in CosasDeCome's guide to the best tapas bars in Triana and Los Remedios.

restaurants.name: Bar Juan Carlos
restaurants.quote: Listed in CosasDeCome's 30-bar tapas guide to Triana and Los Remedios; serves over 100 varieties of cheese.

restaurants.name: Bar Las Golondrinas
restaurants.quote: Seven reader recommendations — highest rated bar in the CosasDeCome guide to tapas in Triana and Los Remedios.

restaurants.name: Besana Tapas Sevilla
restaurants.quote: Two reader recommendations; listed in CosasDeCome's guide to the best tapas bars in Triana and Los Remedios.

restaurants.name: Bodeguita Barbiana Triana
restaurants.quote: Listed in CosasDeCome's 30-bar tapas guide to Triana and Los Remedios by director Pepe Monforte.

restaurants.name: D Culto
restaurants.quote: Price range €40–50; listed among the top restaurants of Nervión by Pepe Monforte, who describes the area as one of the most animated dining zones in Seville.

restaurants.name: Iki
restaurants.quote: Price range €50+; listed among the top restaurants of Nervión by Pepe Monforte; open daily except Sundays.

restaurants.name: Keycha Placer Ibérico
restaurants.quote: Price range €40–50; listed among the top restaurants of Nervión in Pepe Monforte's February 2026 CosasDeCome guide.

restaurants.name: Puerta Caleta
restaurants.quote: Price range €20–30; listed in CosasDeCome's 50-restaurant guide to quality dining in Nervión by Pepe Monforte.

restaurants.name: Restaurante Mara
restaurants.quote: Price range €30–40; daily service; listed in Pepe Monforte's February 2026 guide to the best restaurants in Nervión.

restaurants.name: Tarantelo Tapas
restaurants.quote: A project of siblings Mercedes and Enrique Rico with a defined identity: devotion to red almadraba tuna; serves Tuesday to Sunday in continuous lunch-to-dinner service.

restaurants.name: Athenea Bar
restaurants.quote: Signature tostada pringa con queso; listed in Pepe Monforte's guide to Pino Montano and San Jerónimo as a neighbourhood dining spot.

restaurants.name: Mesón Las Torres
restaurants.quote: Signature ensaladilla de pulpo (octopus salad); listed in CosasDeCome's guide to Pino Montano and San Jerónimo by Pepe Monforte.

restaurants.name: Bar La Paradita
restaurants.quote: Signature menudo (tripe stew); listed in CosasDeCome's guide to dining in Pino Montano and San Jerónimo.

restaurants.name: Brasería La Tremenda
restaurants.quote: Listed in CosasDeCome's guide to dining in Pino Montano and San Jerónimo by Pepe Monforte; serves lunch and dinner daily except Wednesdays.

restaurants.name: Castizo
restaurants.signature_dish: Tosta of Almadraba tuna with mustard mayo and truffle
restaurants.quote: Brioche with Iberian pork jowl and roasted red mullet; green asparagus Cádiz-style carbonara; AC/DC band members dined here; part of Ovejas Negras group with chef Cristóbal Rosales.

restaurants.name: Casa Morales
restaurants.quote: Historic bar on the seafaring García de Vinuesa street in the Arenal district, noted for high foot traffic and signed barrel from Danny Ocean.

restaurants.name: Bodeguita Antonio Romero
restaurants.quote: Specialty croquetas, house-signature piripis, and montaditos; noted for receiving Antonio Carmona of Ketama during the Latin Grammy Awards in Seville.

restaurants.name: María Trifulca
restaurants.quote: Refined views to the Guadalquivir and Seville's monumental riverside make it an excellent draw; Georgina Rodríguez and Cristiano Ronaldo filmed Netflix docuseries at this Triana riverfront restaurant.

restaurants.name: Barra Baja
restaurants.quote: Listed by Sevilla Secreta as a restaurant open in August in Seville; located at c/ Javier Lasso de la Vega, 14.

restaurants.name: Eterno
restaurants.quote: Listed by Sevilla Secreta as open in August; located at c/ Pimienta, 1 in the Santa Cruz area.

restaurants.name: La Casa del Tigre
restaurants.quote: Listed by Sevilla Secreta as open in August; located at c/ Amparo, 9 local 9b.

restaurants.name: Marabunda
restaurants.quote: Listed by Sevilla Secreta as open in August; located at c/ Jesús del Gran Poder, 31 in La Macarena.

restaurants.name: La Vicenta
restaurants.quote: Listed by Sevilla Secreta as open in August; located at c/ Santa Vicenta María, 7.

restaurants.name: Tradevo
restaurants.signature_dish: Tataki de presa ibérica con mojo picón, alcachofas rellenas de rabo de toro
restaurants.quote: Tradition meets evolution; signature tataki de presa ibérica con mojo picón and alcachofas rellenas de rabo de toro, with two locations in Nervión and Centro.

restaurants.name: La Bernarda
restaurants.signature_dish: Salmorejo con helado de aceite de oliva
restaurants.quote: Traditional Sevillian cuisine with a creative touch; signature salmorejo con helado de aceite de oliva; described as a gastrobar with contemporary setting.

restaurants.name: Zelai
restaurants.signature_dish: Bacalao a la vizcaína, txuletón de buey
restaurants.quote: Basque restaurant in Seville; signature bacalao a la vizcaína and txuletón de buey; located on Calle Albareda, 22.

restaurants.name: El Eslava
restaurants.signature_dish: Croquetas de choco y alioli negro, carrillón de cerdo ibérico
restaurants.quote: Uno de los restaurantes más populares de Sevilla; signature croquetas de choco y alioli negro and carrillón de cerdo ibérico in San Lorenzo.

restaurants.name: La Gorda de las Delicias
restaurants.signature_dish: Gambas al ajillo, secreto ibérico a la parrilla con chimichurri
restaurants.quote: Acogedor restaurante que rinde homenaje a la rica tradición culinaria de Andalucía; signature gambas al ajillo and secreto ibérico with chimichurri; on Paseo de las Delicias.

restaurants.name: Depikofino
restaurants.signature_dish: Tartar de atún con aguacate y soja
restaurants.quote: Fusion restaurant on Avenida Eduardo Dato in Nervión; signature tartar de atún con aguacate y soja.

restaurants.name: Sibuya
restaurants.quote: Asian restaurant in the Arenal area; signature sushi variado and fideos udon; located on Calle Albareda, 10.

restaurants.name: Torres y García
restaurants.signature_dish: Carrillera ibérica con parmentier trufado, tartar de langostinos
restaurants.quote: La tradición se mezcla con la modernidad en cada plato; signature carrillera ibérica con parmentier trufado and tartar de langostinos; on Calle Harinas, 2.

restaurants.name: La Taberna del Arenal
restaurants.signature_dish: Rabo de toro, carrillada al Pedro Ximénez
restaurants.quote: Un lugar con encanto e historia near Plaza de Toros; signature rabo de toro and carrillada al Pedro Ximénez.

restaurants.name: Kinu
restaurants.signature_dish: Nigiri with wild sea bream and turbot, aged tuna, fresh wasabi
restaurants.quote: Behind a noren curtain and descending stairs, Kinu offers a 15-course omakase experience for six diners; nigiri made with wild sea bream, turbot, aged tuna, and fresh wasabi.

restaurants.name: Ricca
restaurants.quote: Considered Europe's first omakase pizza bar; six diners at a time experience antipasti, six pizza portions, and dessert cooked in Forni Valoriani ovens from Florence.

restaurants.name: Sr. Cangrejo
restaurants.signature_dish: Barrita Brava, corn aguachile with white shrimp and avocado, crab chawanmushi
restaurants.quote: Una alta cocina que se apoya tanto en los detalles de pinza como en el cuchareo de fondos; one Michelin star; signature corn aguachile with white shrimp and avocado, crab chawanmushi.

restaurants.name: ENEKO Basque Sevilla
restaurants.signature_dish: Hake tempura with green sauce, foie cuajada with citronella, goxua with caramel ice cream
restaurants.quote: Sus raíces culinarias pero con el producto al que está acostumbrada la ciudad; Basque roots using local Andalusian products; hake tempura with green sauce, farm egg yolk with wheat stew.

restaurants.name: Casa Orzáez
restaurants.signature_dish: Artisanal cheese, garbanzos stew, beef round with wheat and vegetables
restaurants.quote: Una oda a la gastronomía; four siblings run this slow-food restaurant with family-made artisanal cheeses, fermented products, and garbanzos stew on Calle Betis in Triana.

restaurants.name: Casa Regina
restaurants.quote: Great traditional food and service, as always; opened April 2025 next to the Encarnación Market.

restaurants.name: Don Jorge
restaurants.quote: A combination of traditional dishes with a few fusiony twists while staying connected to market fresh products; opened May 2025 near Triana market.

restaurants.name: Salpicón
restaurants.quote: A great independent tapas bar has opened in Barrio Santa Cruz; opened August 2025.

restaurants.name: Amorío
restaurants.quote: Sherry plays a major part not only on the wine list but in many of the dishes; opened October 2025.

restaurants.name: Las Golondrinas Centro
restaurants.quote: One of the best-loved tapas bars in town; opened December 2025 in the heart of the city just off Plaza Nueva.

restaurants.name: Raíces
restaurants.quote: The best pisco sours in town; Peruvian chef Daniel Cárdenas offering both nikkei and novoandina cuisines; reopened December 2025.

restaurants.name: Eslava
restaurants.quote: Known to many as the best tapas bar in Seville, this tiny classic bar has kept its prices very low and the quality high.

restaurants.name: Bodega Dos de Mayo
restaurants.quote: The quintessential Seville tapas bar loved by locals and tourists alike; located on Plaza de la Gavidia.

restaurants.name: La Azotea
restaurants.quote: You can instantly tell there is true passion in the kitchen; modern tapas bar on Calle Jesús del Gran Poder with a seasonal changing menu.

restaurants.name: La Brunilda
restaurants.quote: A delicious husband-and-wife-owned and operated tapas bar on Calle Galera with a respectable wine list.

restaurants.name: Sal Gorda
restaurants.quote: One of my favorite places right off of Plaza Alfalfa, this small and unassuming tapas bar serves some wonderful food with craft beers and wines by glass.

restaurants.name: Petit Comité
restaurants.quote: A great place to reserve a table, this innovative restaurant serves up modern and delicious tapas on Calle Dos de Mayo.

restaurants.name: Mechela Restaurante
restaurants.quote: Everything is prepared with lots of love; modern restaurant on Calle Pastor y Landero with signature vegetable lasagna.

restaurants.name: La Moneda
restaurants.signature_dish: Sopa de galeras, fish in manzanilla wine sauce
restaurants.quote: Another of my favorite tapas bars in the city center, Bar La Moneda serves seafood tapas at the bar only; signature sopa de galeras and fish in manzanilla wine sauce.

restaurants.name: Bodeguita Romero
restaurants.signature_dish: Pringá sandwiches, spinach and chickpeas, secreto and presa pork cuts
restaurants.quote: One of Seville's best classic tapas bars; signature pringá sandwiches, spinach and chickpeas, and secreto and presa pork cuts on Calle Harinas.

restaurants.name: ConTenedor
restaurants.quote: An eclectic space that focuses on top-quality ingredients (many of which are organic); signature duck rice; on Calle San Luis in La Macarena.

restaurants.name: Las Golondrinas
restaurants.signature_dish: Marinated vegetables, punta de solomillo, chipirones a la plancha, mushrooms with alioli
restaurants.quote: Hidden away in Triana's ceramics district, this classic spot is known for its delicious and simple tapas; signature punta de solomillo and chipirones a la plancha.

restaurants.name: Casa Moreno
restaurants.quote: One of Seville's many abacerías (part grocery store, part bar); easy to brush off as a tiny store from the outside but a Seville institution on Calle Gamazo.

restaurants.name: El Rinconcillo
restaurants.quote: The oldest bar in Seville, founded in 1670 — El Rinconcillo is a can't-miss; espinacas con garbanzos a signature dish.

restaurants.name: Freiduría La Isla
restaurants.signature_dish: Fried fish, calamares del campo, cazón
restaurants.quote: Seville is famous for fried fish, and my favorite comes from La Isla; signature calamares del campo and cazón on Calle García de Vinuesa.

restaurants.name: Blanco Cerrillo
restaurants.quote: No visit to Seville is complete without popping into Blanco Cerrillo; signature boquerones fritos (fried anchovies) paired with manzanilla.

restaurants.name: La Taberna
restaurants.signature_dish: Rice of the day, grilled grouper and vegetable skewer
restaurants.quote: Another of Seville's best traditional tapas bars, La Taberna is run by Maria and Miguel; signature rice of the day and grilled grouper and vegetables skewer on Calle Gamazo.

restaurants.name: Bodega Santa Cruz (Las Columnas)
restaurants.quote: One of the most classic bars on the border of the Santa Cruz neighborhood; signature montadito de pringá.

restaurants.name: Taberna Águilas
restaurants.quote: One of Seville's most traditional small tapas bars; signature salmorejo and montaditos on Calle Águilas.
